How it works1 · Primary2 · Secondary3 · University4 · IndustryAbout
3

Level 3

University & Executive Education

Roadmap — AY 2027/28

The same methodological core — the Talento · Valore · Successo arc and Human-in-the-Loop by design — adapted for adult learners: leadership, innovation, and human–AI collaboration modules suitable for university and executive-education contexts.

Adapted from Level 1–2

From "talent" to "professional identity"

The Talento · Valore · Successo arc reframed as a leadership-development exercise: where does my contribution create value, and how do I measure success beyond conventional metrics?

From Station 4

Human-in-the-Loop for decision-makers

The same inspection posture pupils develop with comic strips — applied to AI-assisted decision-making, analysis, and reporting in a business context.

From the Teenager Circle

Near-peer / cross-cohort mentoring

Exploring whether the near-peer instruction logic translates to cross-cohort mentoring formats in executive programmes.

Status — honestly stated

This level is a roadmap stub, not a built product. It is included here to show how the same architecture extends to university and executive-education audiences — a natural direction for the Phase II research collaboration with INSEAD, AY 2027/28 and beyond. Nothing on this page represents a committed deliverable or partnership.

See Level 4 — Industry →
AI Palestra.AI Platform

Educational architecture for human–AI co-formation. Jointly developed with the schools and partners of the Palestra AI pilot.

Levels

  • 1 · Primary School
  • 2 · Secondary School

Confidential prototype — not indexed. Demo build for internal review, June 2026.
